
---------------------

=== TalentBridge API — REST Client Test Suite ===


---------------------

=== Order: Register → Login → Use token for all protected endpoints ===


---------------------

=== 1. Register as a Candidate ===

POST http://localhost:5257/api/auth/register
accept-encoding: gzip, deflate, br
accept: */*
content-length: 131
content-type: application/json
user-agent: httpyac

{
  "fullName": "Test Candidate",
  "email": "test.candidate@mail.com",
  "password": "Candidate@123",
  "role": "Candidate"
}
HTTP/1.1 409  - Conflict
content-type: application/json; charset=utf-8
date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 11:22:25 GMT
server: Kestrel
transfer-encoding: chunked

{
  "message": "A user with this email already exists."
}

---------------------

=== 2. Register as a Recruiter ===

POST http://localhost:5257/api/auth/register
accept-encoding: gzip, deflate, br
accept: */*
content-length: 131
content-type: application/json
user-agent: httpyac

{
  "fullName": "Test Recruiter",
  "email": "test.recruiter@acme.com",
  "password": "Recruiter@123",
  "role": "Recruiter"
}
HTTP/1.1 409  - Conflict
content-type: application/json; charset=utf-8
date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 11:22:25 GMT
server: Kestrel
transfer-encoding: chunked

{
  "message": "A user with this email already exists."
}

---------------------

=== 3. Login as Candidate — copy AccessToken from response into candidateToken above ===

POST http://localhost:5257/api/auth/login
accept-encoding: gzip, deflate, br
accept: */*
content-length: 70
content-type: application/json
user-agent: httpyac

{
  "email": "candidate1@mail.com",
  "password": "Candidate@123"
}
HTTP/1.1 200  - OK
content-type: application/json; charset=utf-8
date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 11:22:26 GMT
server: Kestrel
transfer-encoding: chunked

{
  "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..1wvN4HK1A674bIjzb7iM1fNB8QG-rAjiRl6hX9L2RQg",
  "tokenType": "Bearer",
  "expiresIn": 3600,
  "userId": "3800f544-e3db-4f8d-8884-951075badefc",
  "email": "candidate1@mail.com",
  "fullName": "Charlie Brown",
  "role": "Candidate"
}

---------------------

accept-encoding: gzip, deflate, br
accept: */*
content-length: 74
content-type: application/json
user-agent: httpyac

  "password": "Recruiter@123"
}
HTTP/1.1 200  - OK
content-type: application/json; charset=utf-8
date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 11:22:26 GMT
server: Kestrel
transfer-encoding: chunked

{
  "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..KIkRLyulLhWMKGzaGbjvXUjWtBocXJRwZt9loN_zePs",
  "tokenType": "Bearer",
  "expiresIn": 3600,
  "userId": "8c73755e-a895-4617-ae25-b93a3b4dfc5e",
  "email": "recruiter1@acmecorp.com",

}

=== 6. Try login with wrong password (expect 401) ===

POST http://localhost:5257/api/auth/login
accept-encoding: gzip, deflate, br
accept: */*
content-length: 71
content-type: application/json
user-agent: httpyac

{
  "email": "candidate1@mail.com",
  "password": "WrongPassword!"
}
HTTP/1.1 401  - Unauthorized
content-type: application/json; charset=utf-8
date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 11:22:26 GMT
server: Kestrel
transfer-encoding: chunked

{
  "message": "Invalid email or password."
}

---------------------

=== 7. Try to register with invalid role (expect 400) ===

POST http://localhost:5257/api/auth/register
accept-encoding: gzip, deflate, br
accept: */*
content-length: 108
content-type: application/json
user-agent: httpyac

{
  "fullName": "Bad Actor",
  "email": "bad@mail.com",
  "password": "Bad@123456",
  "role": "Admin"
}
HTTP/1.1 400  - Bad Request
content-type: application/json; charset=utf-8
date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 11:22:26 GMT
server: Kestrel
transfer-encoding: chunked

{
  "message": "Role must be 'Candidate' or 'Recruiter'."
}

accept-encoding: gzip, deflate, br
accept: */*
user-agent: httpyac
